details.test: Task 1: Cheapest 8h overnight mobile patrol quote under $400/week
Task 2: Schedule on-site emergency response training (3h, CPR, < $1000)
Task 3: Create high-severity fire alert rule for Building A (SMS + Voice, quiet hours override)
Task 4: Select best 24/7 monitoring package (>=10 cams, < $1200, shortest term)
Task 5: Save most recently updated Workplace Violence Response policy (last 12 months)
Task 6: Create North Campus emergency contact list (3 on-call <= 30 min)
Task 7: Book alarm system health check next Wednesday 09:00–11:00 with highly rated tech
Task 8: Submit low-priority suspicious activity incident (SMS only)
Task 9: Generate last-quarter fire drill compliance report and pin to Safety KPIs
